allow: Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh "Please create a project page for the Japanese finger-spelling dataset \\"ub-MOJI.\\" It should be an attractive website that provides meaningful information about the dataset to researchers and the general public. The site should be mobile-friendly. It should feature a fixed header at the top, a hero section displaying sample videos across the full width of the screen, and various information displayed below that." --json --short-name "ub-moji-project-page" "ub-MOJI Dataset Project Page")
